summary: As of 2026-04-07, MSTR is trading at a discount to the Bitcoin-backed NAV proxy, with premium to NAV at -16.24% and mNAV at 0.84x. Over the last 30 observations, the premium has narrowed by 6.81%, compared with an average premium of -9.78%. During the same window, BTC moved 7.15% while MSTR moved -0.91%, suggesting that the equity valuation may be reflecting more than spot Bitcoin exposure alone.
prompt_preview:
